subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! At a time when sorrows have encompassed this Wronged One from all directions, He maketh mention of His chosen ones and leaves [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی این مظلوم در حینیکه از جمیع جهات احزان احاطه نموده بذکر اولیا و اوراق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
